name: GET 0UT
short_description: A puzzle-solving horror game about a broken father with an unknown past who finds himself in a never-ending cycle, trying to find the answers to his old life, guided by an unknown hand.
detailed_description:
Be Aware! This game WILL challenge you, PLAY ONLY IF YOU DARE.
A puzzle-solving horror game about a broken father with an unknown past who finds himself in a never-ending cycle, trying to find the answers to his old life, guided by an unknown hand.

Solve the puzzles, uncover the secrets, defeat the enemies, and do your best to Get Out of this house of misery.

-Multiple Endings:

you’ll receive the full game, including all possible endings but remember not everything ends the way it seems.

-Living Puzzles:

The ones that don't want you to succeed have different weaknesses, find them and use them against them.

-Strategize:

You must manage your time carefully to find your way out and solve the challenging puzzles, Every mistake counts.

-Replayability:

To uncover the full story and unlock the true ending, you’ll need to explore every corner, learn every secret, and master every challenge. But don’t get too comfortable, each playthrough brings new surprises, shifting elements, and unexpected changes that keep you on your toes.
